mission.title: clickhouse: Implement JWT for ClickHouse
mission.description: Implement JWT for ClickHouse. Requested by 17+ users.

steps.title: Check current clickhouse setup
steps.description:
Verify your clickhouse version and configuration:
```bash
clickhouse-client --version
```
This feature requires a working clickhouse installation.

steps.title: Review clickhouse configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant clickhouse configuration:
**Use case**
We have multiple end users making queries to CH through API server. API server is connected to CH using its own user.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Implement JWT for ClickHouse
steps.description:
### Changelog category (leave one):
- New Feature

### Changelog entry (a user-readable short description of the changes that goes to CHANGELOG.md):
Support JWT authentication in `clickhouse-client`

JWT authentication will be available only in ClickHouse Cloud.

### Documentation entry for user-facing changes

> Information about CI checks: https://clickhouse.com/docs/en/development/continuous-integration/

---

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Implement JWT for ClickHouse" is functioning correctly.
